name: Mindray BC-5000 (Shilaj Hematology)
_comment_host: 0.0.0.0 means listen on all interfaces. The BC-5000 connects TO this middleware PC.
_comment_port: 5100 is the default Mindray HL7 port. Match this in BC-5000 settings: Setup > Communication > LIS > Port
_setup_steps: 1. On BC-5000: Menu > Setup > Communication > LIS
2. Set IP to the middleware PC IP address (e.g., 192.168.1.50)
5. Enable 'Auto Send' to send results automatically after analysis
6. Enable 'Send Graph Data' if you want scattergrams (optional)
7. On middleware PC: Run python h1_middleware.py --config instruments_shilaj.json
_comment_mllp: BC-5000 uses MLLP framing: VT(0x0B) + HL7 message + FS(0x1C) + CR(0x0D)
